name: /incident interactive scaffold asks "How was this detected?" and records answer
command: echo "Pagerduty alert on http_5xx" | bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/incident.sh" --interactive --date 2026-05-04 "Outage" && grep -q "Pagerduty" incidents/2026-05-04-001/timeline.md 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
